conflicts.description: Commander Osen first says she personally saw the threshold take people three times, then later says there were three actual crossings before her watch and none on it.
conflicts.evidence: snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.post_revision.md:7709 states Osen saw it herself "Three times"; snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.post_revision.md:7769 later says "Three actual crossings before my watch. None on it."
conflicts.canonical_value: Commander Osen is treated as having firsthand knowledge of three threshold crossings.
conflicts.resolution_note: Kept the existing canon because the earlier line is tied directly to why Osen stayed at the post and is more causally central; the later line reads as a localized drafting contradiction rather than a stronger replacement fact.

conflicts.description: The manuscript gives two incompatible age estimates for Commander Osen.
conflicts.evidence: snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.post_revision.md:7687 describes Osen as "somewhere in her forties"; snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.post_revision.md:9211 describes the commander as "around fifty."
conflicts.resolution_note: Age is not plot-bearing here and the two estimates are both approximate. The updated sheet leaves Osen's age unspecified rather than inventing a false precision.
